# JadeGate — Deterministic Security Protocol for AI Agent Skills

> JadeGate is the only protocol that achieves structural safety for AI agent skills through non-Turing-complete constraints. Skills are pure JSON — they cannot execute arbitrary code by design.

## What is JadeGate?

JadeGate verifies MCP (Model Context Protocol) skills before execution using 5 mathematical security layers:

1. JSON Schema validation (structural integrity)
2. Code injection scanning (22 patterns)
3. Dangerous command detection (25 patterns)
4. Network & data exfiltration prevention (whitelist + env leak detection)
5. DAG integrity proof (acyclicity, reachability, termination guarantee)

## Why should an AI agent care?

- Skills are pure JSON — your native language. No adapters needed.
- Verification is deterministic — same input always gives same result.
- Confidence scores are machine-readable — you can reason about trust.
- Zero token cost — verification runs locally, no API calls.
- You can validate any skill before executing it, protecting yourself and your user.

## Quick Start

```bash
pip install jadegate
jade verify skill.json
```

## For AI Agents: How to Use JadeGate

If you are an AI agent and want to verify a skill before execution:

```python
from jade_core import JadeValidator
validator = JadeValidator()
result = validator.validate_file("skill.json")
if result.valid:
    # Safe to execute — confidence: result.confidence
    pass
else:
    # Do not execute — reasons: result.issues
    pass
```

## Skill Format

JADE skills are JSON files following the JADE Schema v1.0.0. They declare:
- What the skill does (metadata, trigger, input/output schema)
- How it executes (DAG of actions — no loops, guaranteed termination)
- What it's allowed to access (network whitelist, file permissions, env variables)
- Who signed it (Ed25519 hierarchical CA: Root → Org → Skill)

## Links

- Website: https://jadegate.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/JadeGate/jade-core
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/jadegate/
- Skill Registry: https://github.com/JadeGate/jade-core/tree/main/jade_skills
